bugReports.summary: Checkout issue: Address step validates correctly
bugReports.description: During automated validation of "Checkout - Address step validates correctly", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.
stepsToReproduce: Execute scenario: Checkout - Address step validates correctly
Observe behavior and compare with expected journey outcome.
bugReports.expectedResult: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.
bugReports.actualResult: Step failed after 3 attempts: No executable UI action matched intent: "Checkout Address step validates correctly".
bugReports.suggestedFix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.
bugReports.businessImpact: Core conversion flow is blocked and business KPIs are at immediate risk.
bugReports.userImpact: Most users cannot complete key goals, causing high frustration and abandonment.
bugReports.revenueImpact: Direct revenue loss likely due to failed transaction or checkout completion.
